backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Image and Prompt types, user profiles, storage maps for active/used prompts and created/completed/published images, and includes blob storage and authorization mixins with CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: rebranding from 'Wallop' to 'Wall Pop', text readability improvements with semi-transparent backgrounds, comprehensive functionality audit, and downloadable project package.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing their purpose, including components for authentication, image generation, gallery, admin panel, and styling with 'Wall Pop' branding and readability enhancements.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with 'Wall Pop' branding in title and meta tags, PWA manifest link, favicon, and mobile-optimized viewport settings.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining 'Wall Pop' app metadata with black theme, standalone display mode, portrait orientation, icons, and screenshots for installability.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication flow with Internet Identity, profile setup modal, admin panel toggle, and routing between HomePage and AdminPanel with skull-flames background.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, red heart icon, and caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking using hostname as app identifier, styled with semi-transparent dark background.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Image gallery component displaying published images in a grid with modal view, download functionality, delete option for owners, and semi-transparent dark backgrounds for readability.
Main image generation component with text-to-image and image-to-image modes, featuring undo/redo history, file upload, image editing, and gallery display of generated images.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header component displaying the Wall Pop logo, login/logout button, and conditional admin settings button for authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Landing page component shown to unauthenticated users, featuring hero section, feature cards (text-to-image, image-to-image, save/download), and sample images.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile creation form component that prompts new users to enter their name and saves it to their user profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, automatically invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend API calls including user profiles, admin functions, image CRUD operations, prompts, and daily usage limits with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including color tokens for UI components and utility classes for text readability backgrounds and a skull-flames background image.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component that displays content statistics (images, prompts) and daily generation limits, with access control checking if the caller is an admin.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main authenticated home page with tabbed interface switching between Generate and Gallery sections, showing LoginPrompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Wall Pop application state, including known issues (text readability, non-working functionality), existing features for branding updates and functionality audits, and pending feature requests.
